_source: AcroForm field dump extracted via pikepdf from the canonical OSC PDF AC 3237-S (Rev. 1/17): https://www.osc.ny.gov/files/vendors/2017-11/vendor-form-ac3237s-fe.pdf
_note: Authoritative field inventory: 21 fields (17 /Tx text + 4 /Btn button). The config-completeness test asserts data/config/forms/ac3237s.json covers exactly these names. Committed instead of the PDF binary because the PDF was not available in the build session; swap to live PDF extraction once the PDF is committed.
